steps: Enter your email address and password to create a free account
Verify your email address via the confirmation link sent to your inbox
Log in and you will be redirected to https://app.ipgeolocation.io/dashboard
Your API key is displayed on the dashboard under 'Your API Key'
Copy the API key for use in requests as the 'apiKey' query parameter

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your IPGeolocation API key, found on the dashboard after signing up

notes: Free tier available: 30,000 requests/month with no credit card required
Paid plans start from $15/month for higher volume
API key is passed as a query parameter: ?apiKey=YOUR_KEY
Free tier does not include security threat data or bulk lookups
Rate limit on free tier: 1 request/second

test_endpoint.description: Returns geolocation data for the caller's IP address
